economic_notes: Nation has Treaty Benefits Claim against Government of Canada initiated in 2018. COVID-19 impacted operations. Nation has Economic Development Holdings Limited Partnership with no activity. Kanatinak Store 2 Inc. generated net income of $116,396. 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd. incurred net loss of $101,503.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (year ended March 31, 2021). Auditor issued Emphasis of Matter paragraph regarding Treaty Benefit Claim loan and insurance (Notes 10 and 12). Bank indebtedness of $202,079 shown as negative cash (overdraft). Net debt position of $12,153,938. Three entities accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs): Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings LP, Kanatinak Store 2 Inc., 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd. Five entities fully consolidated including CMHC Housing, Royalty Corporation, Treaty Land Entitlement Trust, West Arrow Development Corp. Poundmaker Legacy Trust not consolidated as Chief and Council do not control it. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $12,053,447 + CMHC $134,798 + Government of Canada $9,600 = $12,197,845; osr = $14,491,324 - $12,197,845 = $2,293,479. annual_debt_service reflects repayment of long-term debt only per cash flow statement ($536,854). COVID-19 additional funding received from ISC.
